goal_alignment: LFA Goal directly addresses call's main objective
LFA Goal aligns with call's expected impact
LFA Goal covers call's target scope/geography
outcome_alignment: LFA Outcomes address call's expected outcomes
LFA Outcomes cover call's key impact areas
LFA Outcomes align with call's success criteria
activity_alignment: LFA Activities are within call's scope
LFA Activities address call's target beneficiaries
LFA Activities align with call's methodology requirements
completeness: All logical levels present (Goal, Purpose, Outcomes, Outputs, Activities)
Clear hierarchy from Goal to Activities
